news: Pichle 24 ghante me kya hua hai, aayiye jaldi se dekhte hain badi khabrein!
Prime Minister Modi ne Trump ke Gaza peace plan ki tarif ki, keh rahe hain yeh ek 'Significant step forward' hai, India ka full support hai Trump ke saath!
US mein businesses Trump ke $100,000 H-1B fee par naraaz, yeh decision desh ki economy par bhi asar daal sakta hai!
Zubeen Garg ki maut par festival organiser ne Supreme Court ka darwaza khatkhataya, investigation ko transfer karne ki maang!
Center ka bada warning, 2 saal se chhote bacchon ke liye sardi ki dawa ka istemal na karein, do states mein hui hain halanki deaths!
Pakistan-occupied Kashmir mein protest mein bhari maut, logon ki demands aur Pakistan sarkar ka jawab jaanein!
Vijay rally stampede mein naya mod, Madras High Court ne SIT probe ka order diya hai, Madurai bench ne CBI probe mana kiya!
Maharashtra tayyar hai cyclone Shakti se takkar lene ke liye, IMD ne Mumbai mein tez baarish ka alert jari kiya!
Elon Musk ka emoji reply angrezi hukumat par ki gai post par bahut rage faila raha hai, Twitter par ho rahi hai charcha!
Putin ka Modi ke liye badi tarif, keh rahe hain 'balanced, wise leader', saath hi Russia-India trade balance par bhi focus!
Ladakh activist Sonam Wangchuk ki wife Supreme Court pohchi unke detention ke khilaf, jaanein kya hai poora mamla!
Toh, aaj ke liye itna hi. Hamari team aapko har nai khabar se update rakhti rahegi. Tab tak ke liye, apna khayal rakhen aur surakshit rahen. Namaskar.
